name: Steel Plated Hood Sickle
description: Steel Plated Hood Sickle is a steel plated counterpart of Hood Sickle in Skylanders: Imaginators.
biography: Steel Plated Hood Sickle is a steel plated counterpart of Hood Sickle in Skylanders: Imaginators.
personality: Not much is known about Steel Plated Hood Sickle's personality, other than being a steel plated counterpart of Hood Sickle.

story.content: Steel Plated Hood Sickle is a steel plated counterpart of Hood Sickle in Skylanders: Imaginators.

trivia: Despite having the same pattern as Steel Plated Smash Hit in the figure, he looks closer to white in-game.
He's the only Alt Deco Skylander of the Dark element to have a toy.
His English voice actor is J.B. Blanc.
gameplay: Steel Plated Hood Sickle is a Dark Sentinel Sensei in Skylanders: Imaginators. He shares the same moveset as Hood Sickle but features a unique steel-plated appearance. As a Sentinel, he uses his scythe to control the battlefield and teleport through darkness.

basic.name: Dark Dislocation
basic.content: Teleport and leave a dark remnant behind to confuse enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Dark Combo
basic_upgrades.content: An advanced combination of scythe strikes.

basic_upgrades.name: More Remnants
basic_upgrades.content: Allows for more dark remnants to be summoned at once.
